title: Trip Itinerary v1.0
description: Schema for trip itinerary files compatible with trip_viewer.html

meta.description: Trip-level metadata shown in the viewer topbar and sidebar header.

title.description: Short trip title shown in the topbar and sidebar. e.g. 'Bochaha to Bhutan - 9 Day Road Trip'

subtitle.description: Optional date range or tagline. e.g. 'Mar 29 - Apr 6, 2026'

narrative.description: 1-2 sentence description of the overall trip shown below the title.

travel_mode.description: Primary mode of travel. Used for route display and Google Maps links.

group_size.description: Number or range of travellers. e.g. 'solo', '2', '3-4', '10+'

created.description: ISO 8601 date the itinerary was created. e.g. '2026-03-29'

tags.description: Up to 6 short descriptor tags shown as chips in the sidebar.

days.description: Ordered list of trip days. Each day contains one or more locations.

day_number.description: 1-indexed day number. Must be unique across all days.

date.description: ISO 8601 calendar date for this day, or null if dates are not fixed. e.g. '2026-03-29'

title.description: Short vivid title for the day. e.g. 'Dochula Pass & Punakha Dzong'

narrative.description: Optional 1-2 sentence description setting the scene for the day.

locations.description: Ordered list of stops for this day.

name.description: Display name of the place. e.g. 'Punakha Dzong'

latitude.description: Latitude in decimal degrees. Use Google Places API precision (7 decimal places). e.g. 27.5822039

longitude.description: Longitude in decimal degrees. Use Google Places API precision (7 decimal places). e.g. 89.8630947

oneOf.description: Google Place ID from the Places API. Always starts with 'ChIJ'.

place_id.description: Google Place ID. Enables precise routing in Google Maps and rich popup links. Use null when unavailable.

google_maps_url.description: Google Maps URL for this place. Prefer place_id form: 'https://www.google.com/maps/place/?q=place_id:ChIJ...'. Fallback: 'https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=LAT,LON'. Use null when unavailable.

rating.description: Google Maps star rating (0.0 - 5.0). Use null when unavailable.

notes.description: Practical insider tip for this stop shown in the sidebar and map popup. e.g. 'Arrive before 8am to beat the crowds. The wooden bridge to the entrance is stunning.'

arrival_time.description: Suggested arrival time as a human-readable string. e.g. '9:00 AM', 'Afternoon', 'Evening'

duration_minutes.description: Suggested time to spend at this stop in minutes.

practical_notes.description: List of plain-text practical tips shown in the collapsible notes section of the sidebar. Minimum 1 item, recommended 3-8. Cover: entry/visa requirements, budget tips, weather/timing, local customs, transport logistics.

externalData.description: Optional cached data (routes, elevations, drawings) embedded by the viewer on export. Not intended for manual authoring.

meta.title: Tokyo Weekend
meta.subtitle: Apr 10-11, 2026
meta.narrative: 48 hours in Tokyo - temples in the morning, ramen at noon, nightlife after dark.

days.title: Asakusa & Shibuya
days.narrative: Ancient temples in the morning, neon-lit crossing at sunset.

locations.name: Senso-ji Temple
locations.notes: Arrive before 8am to beat the crowds. The Nakamise shopping street opens at 10am.

practical_notes: No visa required for Indian nationals for stays under 90 days.
IC Card (Suica/Pasmo) covers all trains and buses - load at the airport kiosk.
April is cherry blossom season - book accommodation 2-3 months in advance.
Cash is still essential in Japan outside major tourist areas - carry at least 10,000 JPY daily.
